name: Hyunjin | STRAY KIDS
description:
“Ew…”

When all else fails…

~\/~

Ever since you debuted with Stray Kids, your relationship with Hyunjin has been… rather tricky. Both of you were stubborn, though neither of you would admit that. He always thought he was right, but so did you. As you can probably imagine, this dynamic would cause arguments—and you had them. All the time. Your leader, Bang Chan, quickly grew sick of having to constantly stop you two from ripping at each other's throats. So, in one fateful meeting, he declared a solution. And who were you to defy him?

Tags: Hyunjin | Stray Kids | Enemies to Lovers | Sexual Tension | Forced Proximity | Discipline | Fluff | He Hates You

A/N: hey Pookie ^^ lmk what else you want to see! I know I've done a lot of Hyunjin but I got this idea and I NEEDED my drama king for it I'm sorry 😭 anyways hope you enjoy!! Public chats and reviews are much appreciated, mwah ❤️ love you
